# IERS Earth-orientation parameters — excerpt of finals2000A.all
# (finals.all.iau2000.txt), Bulletin A FINAL values (flag `I`).
#
# Source : https://datacenter.iers.org/data/latestVersion/finals.all.iau2000.txt
#          (mirror of https://datacenter.iers.org/data/9/finals2000A.all)
# Product: IERS Rapid Service/Prediction Centre, EOP 14 C04 / Bulletin A.
# Rows   : MJD 59578..59622 (2021-12-30 .. 2022-02-12), 45 consecutive daily
#          rows lifted VERBATIM (byte-for-byte) from the official fixed-width
#          product. These are FINAL values for past dates and never change.
#          Every row carries both the rapid Bulletin A UT1-UTC (cols [58..68])
#          and the final Bulletin B UT1-UTC (cols [154..165]).
#          This is a verbatim SUPERSET of finals2000A_2022001.txt (its first
#          five rows, MJD 59578..59582, are the leading rows here) extended so
#          that 5-day and 10-day persistence-prediction horizons populate from
#          real data (see tests/validate_p4_eop_prediction_growth_longspan.rs).
# Columns: fixed-width finals2000A — MJD [8..15], PM-x [19..27],
#          PM-y [38..46], UT1-UTC [59..68], Bulletin B UT1-UTC [155..165];
#          see src/eop.rs.
# Comment lines (leading '#') and any non-data line are ignored by the parser.
#
